yeah helot uses bema and mina, which are greek measurements
helot is also from sparta and hates spartans
sparta is famously not in italy

"helot" is the name of a social class in sparta that did all the manual labor while the spartans abused them, so they were worse than slaves, there was no possibility of freedom as long as they stayed under spartan rule
